3.sql: SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse AS risk_class, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ILIKE '%høy%' OR skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ILIKE '%hoy%' OR skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ILIKE '%high%';

1.description: Get kommunenummer for Trondheim using kommunenavn ILIKE

2.description: Select building id and geometry for buildings in the municipality using kommunenummer

3.description: Query quick-clay hazard areas in the municipality — two query options provided: (A) apply corrected risk_class filter for high risk variants; (B) no risk_class filter (keep all in municipality) so risk filtering can be done by attribute after spatial join

4.description: Spatially join buildings (step 2) with quick-clay areas (step 3) to find intersecting buildings

5.description: Aggregate count of intersecting buildings (for reporting)

6.description: Sort intersecting buildings by bygningid ascending
